task: happy path — discover then attempt auth-gated call
what_worked: llms.txt at root gave a clear map of skill files, auth model, and conventions in one shot
flowlink.md agent quickstart spelled out the full invoice→pay→receipt flow with copy-pasteable curl
compliance.md declared auth: [siwe, api-key, none] so no auth dance was needed for the preflight
POST /v1/compliance/check accepted the request and returned structured Problem+JSON (not a 404 or HTML)
unauth POST /v1/invoices returned exactly the documented auth_required code with an agent_action field pointing back at /.well-known/flowlink.md
what_failed: compliance check itself returned 503 compliance_upstream_unavailable (fail-closed, OFAC upstream timed out) — expected per docs, but means the preflight did not yield a score
could not actually score the requested address; agent would need to retry with backoff per agent_action
context_observations: Discovery was cheap: three markdown files (llms.txt 1.6KB, flowlink.md 3.4KB, compliance.md 2.7KB = ~7.7KB) were enough to construct both POSTs correctly on the first try. The agent_action field on every error made the next step unambiguous without re-reading skill docs.

log.notes: Root discovery doc. Lists 5 skills, auth options (SIWE or API key bearer), RFC 9457 Problem+JSON error shape, idempotency requirement, and link to errors catalogue.
Agent quickstart with full invoice→pay→receipt curl example. Confirms every /v1/* call needs Authorization: Bearer and every write needs Idempotency-Key. Fail-closed OFAC noted.
Compliance skill spec. Frontmatter auth: [siwe, api-key, none] confirms /v1/compliance/check is a public preflight. Documents 200 clear / 403 sanctioned / 503 upstream responses and score thresholds.

compliance_upstream_unavailable — OFAC check timed out, fail-closed by design. Response is valid Problem+JSON with agent_action = 'Backoff and retry.' Endpoint reachable, no auth needed, request shape accepted.

auth_required: title 'Authentication required', code 'auth_required', agent_action 'Provide Authorization: Bearer <token>. See /.well-known/flowlink.md for SIWE flow.' Clean 401 with pointer back to the auth doc.
